text.title: ADR Supersession Detection Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure that walks an operator from trigger to validated artefact. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where applicable) a decision gate that stops the flow on policy violation.

step.name: report-candidates
step.action: Render report; do NOT mutate ADRs.

step.name: route-to-review
step.action: Send to architect for confirmation; on confirm add `supersedes:` link.
